column1: #mapping_set_description: LLM-generated mappings from the FIX Protocol LinkML schema to the FIXP (FIX Performance Session Layer) LinkML schema. Coverage is narrow because fix-protocol describes the application metamodel rather than the session layer; only Infrastructure-area and session-protocol enums align.

column8: Infrastructure business area covers session-layer concerns; FIXP is a session-protocol container.
Enum lists FIX session protocols; FIXP is one such protocol's message family.
